ttl.name: REAR SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR BENCH TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 36 hog rings.
Remove the 16 hog rings and rear bench type seat cushion cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws and 2 rear seat shoulder belt guides LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the hook.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the rear seat headrest support.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)
REMOVE REAR SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER

s2.ptxt: Disengage the hooks and remove the rear seat back assembly.
Remove the rear seat belt hook.
Remove the rear separate type seat back cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR CENTER SEAT ARMREST ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and 2 bushes.
Remove the rear center seat armrest assembly.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the rear seat headrest support.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CENTER SEAT BACK COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 hog rings.
Disengage the hooks and remove the center seat back cover sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CENTER SEAT ARMREST PLATE INNER

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 11 claws and then remove the center seat armrest plate inner.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT CENTER ARMREST BOX ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts.
Disengage the 2 claws and then remove the rear seat center armrest box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH
REMOVE RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt.
Disengage the 2 clips and the claw and then separate the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Separate the rear seat reclining control cable and remove the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT RECLINING ADJUSTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts and rear seat reclining adjuster assembly.
